title: Tofu Skewers with Smoky Croation Flair
description: A unique Mexican-inspired recipe that combines smoky flavors with crispy texture, featuring Croatian-style spices and marinated tofu on skewers.
instructions: 2. In a blender or food processor, combine Croatian Paprika, Smoked Paprika, cumin, chili powder, and lime juice. Blend until smooth.
3. Cut tofu into 1-inch cubes and place in a large bowl.
4. Pour the spice mixture over the tofu and toss to coat.
5. Brush skewers with olive oil and thread tofu onto the skewers.
6. Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the tofu is golden brown and crispy.
7. Sprinkle crispy fried onions over the skewers and serve immediately.
8. Garnish with additional lime wedges and serve with your favorite Mexican-inspired sides.
